title: Arizona St. hires Saint Mary's Bennett as new HC
content: Arizona State has hired Saint Mary's Randy Bennett as its next head coach, the school announced Monday.

title: UVA ousts Iowa; 1st First Four team in Sweet 16
content: Virginia is the first First Four to reach the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA tournament after knocking off host Iowa 83-75 in double overtime.

title: Sources: Cincinnati to hire Utah State's Calhoun
content: Jerrod Calhoun, who has been the Bearcats' top target since the job opened, has led the Aggies to back-to-back NCAA tournaments.

title: Sources: JSN gets record extension with Seattle
content: Jaxon Smith-Njigba has reached agreement with the Seahawks on a four-year, $168.6 million extension that makes him the highest-paid wide receiver in NFL history, sources told ESPN.

title: Hurley turned to Izzo for advice on Lakers job
content: Tom Izzo has turned down multiple opportunities to coach in the NBA, including with the Cavaliers and Hawks. When the Lakers were willing to give UConn coach Dan Hurley a six-year, $70 million contract in 2024, Hurley asked Izzo for advice.

title: Mets phenom Benge to start after sizzling spring
content: Mets prospect Carson Benge, who hit .366 in spring training, will be on the Opening Day roster as the starting right fielder, manager Carlos Mendoza said.

title: ⚾ 2026 ESPN Fantasy Baseball draft guide
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

title: Women's March Madness live updates: Previews, action from Monday's second round
content: How do the teams in Monday's second round match up? We're tracking all eight games as the Sweet 16 is set.

title: TGL playoffs: What to watch in the championship matchup
content: Who will take home the SoFi Cup in Year 2? It's Los Angeles Golf Club vs. Jupiter Links GC for the title.

title: Ranking the 10 best and 10 worst NBA transactions since last summer
content: Bradley Beal to the Clippers? Jared McCain to the Thunder!? We ranked the best and worst moves since last offseason.

title: LeBron, Austin Reaves on the origins of their viral meme
content: Four years ago, a clip showing James giving instructions to a befuddled Reaves at the end of a 2022 game against the Nets went viral in a major way.

title: NHL playoff watch: Projecting Senators' wild-card chances -- and who should be scared
content: Can Ottawa claim a spot to the dance? Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Sunday.

title: What has changed for Jack Hughes one month after Olympic golden goal?
content: The moment was surreal for the Devils' center and his teammates. The weeks after have been a roller-coaster.

title: Are you ready for Opening Day? Here's your guide to the offseason chaos that rocked MLB
content: Kyle Tucker got how much from the Dodgers!? Pete Alonso left the Mets for WHERE!? It's time to get up to speed after a wild winter.

title: Does it pay to spend on big contracts? Barnwell on a surprising NFL free agency trend going back to 2013
content: Let's look at the largest contracts from 2013 to 2022 to see how often megadeals meet expectations, from Tom Brady to Brock Osweiler.

title: Will Daniel Jones return to form? Colts are banking on it
content: Indy made a huge investment in Jones recovering from his Achilles injury, and so far, signs are positive.

title: How Jaxon Smith-Njigba's contract extension impacts Seahawks, Rams' Puka Nacua
content: Answering five questions about the record-breaking contract extension for the NFL's top receiver in 2025.

title: Haliburton trolls Kentucky NBA alums after Iowa State win
content: John Calipari, who most of Kentucky's active NBA contingent played for in Lexington, coaches Arkansas these days.

title: Women's tournament: Lines, totals and BPI for Monday's games
content: Money lines, spreads, totals and BPI for Monday's games in the women's college basketball tournament.

title: Men's tournament first bets: Picks to make now for the next two rounds
content: A few bets that stand out after an exciting first weekend of the men's college basketball tournament.

title: Carabao Cup reality check for Arsenal, Man City; Madrid's bravery rewarded in derby
content: Man City got the better of Arsenal. Will this impact their Premier League battle? Meanwhile, Real Madrid's bravery is rewarded in the derby and the mess at Chelsea continues.

title: No plan, no fight: Spurs hurtling toward relegation after limp loss to Forest
content: The thousand-yard stare has become the only guarantee at Tottenham, and it's staring into the abyss of relegation.

title: MLS Power Rankings: Nashville displaces LAFC, Caps to go No. 1
content: LAFC still haven't conceded in league play in 2026, but that defensive prowess isn't enough to top this week's edition of ESPN's MLS Power Rankings.

title: Pickups: Jazz's Chandler, Wizards' Coulibaly among top adds
content: Every week in fantasy basketball, there are available players who can help fill holes in your roster. Here are the ones to add for the week ahead.

title: 'Fake news': Iranian Speaker says Trump's talk claims aimed at manipulating oil markets
content: Iran has denied holding any negotiations with the United States, labeling Trump's claims of "very good and productive conversations" as "fake news" intended to manipulate oil markets. Tehran insists no talks are underway and that such statements are a tactic to escape a difficult situation, while Trump announced a temporary pause on military strikes against Iranian targets.

title: Parliament seats may be increased to 816 for 1/3rd women's reservation
content: The government plans to introduce bills for one-third women's reservation in Lok Sabha and assembly polls, potentially increasing Lok Sabha seats to 816. This move aims to empower women and reshape the political landscape. Implementation hinges on delimitation, with a proposal to use the 2011 census data to ensure the quota is effective by the 2029 elections.

title: Conflict posing unprecedented challenges for India, PM Modi tells Parliament
content: Prime Minister Modi highlighted India's stance on the West Asia conflict in Parliament. He stressed opposition to attacks on infrastructure and trade routes. India advocates for diplomacy and peaceful resolution. Efforts are underway to ensure safe passage for Indian ships and secure vital supplies like oil and gas. The government is in contact with international partners to maintain maritime safety.

title: Your next LPG refill could be of 10kg instead of regular 14.2kg
content: Oil marketing companies are reportedly considering delivering underweight LPG cylinders to ensure more equitable distribution amid critical availability. While the petroleum ministry dismisses these reports as speculative, refiners confirm the proposal is under government consideration. Increased domestic production is now meeting a higher percentage of demand, despite disruptions in West Asia impacting imports.

title: H-1B registration dips 30-50%: Companies that are emerging as ‘favourites’ in new system
content: H-1B visa registrations for FY27 saw a 30-50% drop, reflecting employer caution due to higher fees and a new wage-based lottery. This shift benefits mid-tier IT firms and U.S. Master's degree holders, leveling the playing field against large outsourcing giants and prioritizing specialized talent.

title: 'Bomb our little hearts out': Trump sets 5-day window for 15-point Iran deal — what he said
content: President Trump announced major points of agreement with Iran following weekend talks aimed at ending the ongoing conflict. He stated that Iran giving up nuclear weapons was the top priority, with a 15-point framework under discussion. Trump also claimed US strikes on Iranian nuclear facilities were a "complete success" in preventing Tehran from acquiring a nuclear weapon.

title: 2 India-flagged tankers clear Hormuz; Iran denies taking ransom
content: Two Indian-flagged LPG tankers, Jag Vasant and Pine Gas, carrying substantial cooking gas, successfully navigated the war-torn Strait of Hormuz. This marks the fourth Indian vessel passage since the conflict's onset, with four more Indian ships and crews awaiting safe transit.  The government is prioritizing their secure passage amid regional tensions.

title: Burnt in Ashes, but no clean-up: ECB decides against sacking Stokes & McCullum
content: The review, which was announced soon after the final Test in January, was completed on Monday. ECB chief executive Richard Gould said removing individuals would have been the easier option but the board has chosen not to take that route.

title: Jensen Huang to Nvidia engineers: You are not productive if you don't use a lot of ...
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang stressed the critical role of AI tools for engineers, stating that those not extensively using them are unproductive. He believes engineers should leverage AI tokens heavily, comparing the technology to Industrial Revolution machinery that enhances mental work and creativity. This approach is gaining traction across tech companies aiming to boost productivity.

title: SC: Mamata government hell-bent on impeding Kolkata Metro project
content: The Supreme Court sternly criticized the West Bengal government for obstructing the Kolkata Metro Orange Line's completion, calling their appeal "frivolous" and an "obstinate anti-development agenda." The court rejected the state's plea for time until May, citing elections, and emphasized the government's dereliction of duty in delaying a vital public transport project.

title: PM Modi: India has strategic petro reserves of over 53 lakh tonne
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi assured that the government is actively working to maintain uninterrupted supplies of essential commodities like petrol, diesel, gas, and fertilizers amidst West Asian conflicts. Diversified energy import sources, increased ethanol blending, and extensive railway electrification have significantly reduced dependence on fossil fuels, bolstering India's energy security.

title: Ajinkya Rahane sends strong message ahead of IPL 2026 with blazing 20-ball fifty
content: Kolkata Knight Riders captain Ajinkya Rahane signaled his intent for IPL 2026 with a rapid 58 off 25 balls in a practice game. Despite a tough 2025, Rahane, the team's leading scorer, expressed optimism and a positive outlook towards the upcoming season. He emphasized the importance of a strong start and consistent performance for the revamped KKR squad.

title: First human patient with Elon Musk's Neuralink brain chip shares 100 days update
content: Noland Arbaugh, the first recipient of Neuralink's brain implant, celebrated 100 days of using the device.  Paralyzed since 2016, he now controls a MacBook and plays World of Warcraft solely with his thoughts. Arbaugh described the experience as "science fiction that somehow became my everyday reality," highlighting newfound independence and a transformed life.

title: Parl panel calls for comprehensive 'gender-sensitive' law to combat cybercrime
content: A parliamentary committee has urged the government to create a unified, gender-sensitive cybercrime law following a significant rise in online offenses against women and children. The report highlights the need for age-appropriate social media regulations and stronger platform accountability, including mandatory KYC verification, to combat fake profiles and harassment.

title: Gold prices crash! US-Iran war wipes out $9tn yellow metal market cap - is it losing its shine?
content: In times of geopolitical uncertainties, gold is the go to investment - it’s a time-tested safe haven that investors rush to. Then why are gold prices plunging amidst the ongoing war? Does this mean that gold’s safe haven appeal is fading?

title: Shedeur Sanders’ Cleveland Browns tied to $91 million Philadelphia Eagles WR
content: Cleveland Browns are linked to Philadelphia Eagles star A.J. Brown to bolster their struggling wide receiver corps. Despite Brown’s on-gridiron frustrations, analysts suggest he could be the WR1 Cleveland desperately needs, potentially costing a high draft pick. The Browns are known for acquiring problematic players like Deshaun Watson. They may face significant financial considerations for the veteran receiver. The Patriots who were also eyeing Brown, are out of competition now.

title: Doncic cleared to play: NBA rescinds suspension listing; star available vs Pistons
content: Luka Doncic faces a surprising one-game suspension for the Lakers' March 23rd clash against the Pistons, despite his 16th technical foul being rescinded. This unexpected absence impacts the surging Lakers, who are on a nine-game win streak.  The Pistons, leading the East, will also be without star Cade Cunningham, creating a pivotal matchup.

title: Elliotte Friedman hints at James Hagens’ signing decision coming soon
content: NHL Insider Elliotte Friedman hinted at a decision regarding top prospect James Hagens' professional future by Monday. While Hagens, the Bruins' seventh overall pick in 2025, has impressed, the team might hesitate to rush him into the NHL roster during their playoff push. Friedman believes Hagens is a great fit, but the exact path, NHL or AHL, remains uncertain.

title: CBI, ED showing reluctance in ADAG probe: SC
content: The Supreme Court has expressed strong disapproval of probe agencies' perceived hesitation in investigating Anil Ambani's ADAG group for alleged Rs 40,000 crore loan fraud. Directing CBI and ED to expedite a coordinated inquiry, the court emphasized transparency and fairness. Fresh status reports are mandated within four weeks, with the court urging action against all involved in irregular loan sanctions.

title: Nirav Modi appears in person to fight Rs 100 crore Bank of India case in London
content: Fugitive jeweller Nirav Modi appeared in a London court to contest a Rs 100 crore claim by Bank of India. The bank seeks repayment of a loan to his company, Firestar Diamond, for which Modi provided a personal guarantee.

title: Colombian military plane with 110 soldiers on board erupts in flames after crash — watch
content: A Lockheed Martin Hercules C-130 aircraft carrying approximately 110 soldiers crashed in southern Colombia near the Peruvian border. The accident occurred during takeoff from Puerto Leguizamo, with video footage showing the plane engulfed in flames. The exact number of victims and the cause of the crash are still under investigation.

title: Horoscope today: Daily astrological predictions for March 24
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for March 24, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: 'No security concerns': Bangladesh Cricket Board allows players to join PSL
content: In a statement issued on Monday, the board said it had been in touch with the Ministry of Youth & Sports and the Ministry of Foreign Affairs before taking a decision.

title: Fact check: Did a former employee expose Candace Owens behavior?
content: A former employee has accused Candace Owens of “narcissistic” behavior, but the claims remain unverified. No evidence, official response, or independent confirmation has been provided. The allegations mention Turning Point USA and Blexit, but nothing has been proven. Social media remains divided, and the situation is still unclear with no investigation or legal action so far.

title: PSL's loss, RR's gain! Sangakkara hails Shanaka as 'ideal replacement' for Sam Curran
content: Rajasthan Royals face a setback as Sam Curran is out of IPL 2026 due to injury. Dasun Shanaka has been signed as his replacement. Shanaka brings T20 experience and all-round ability. The Royals begin their campaign against Chennai Super Kings on March 30. They will then play Gujarat Titans, Mumbai Indians, and Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

title: 'PM Modi 100% under control of Trump': Rahul takes shot at Centre over Iran war
content: Rahul Gandhi accused Prime Minister Narendra Modi of being 'compromised' and controlled by US President Donald Trump, criticizing his speech on the West Asia conflict. Gandhi also voiced concerns over a trade deal he claims will harm Indian farmers and alleged the BJP-RSS are undermining tribal rights by promoting the term 'Vanvasi'.

title: Not Kishan or Abhishek: Irfan Pathan predicts this Indian player to hold SRH together
content: Hyderabad begin their campaign against Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on March 28. While focus remains on players like Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head, Ishan Kishan, Heinrich Klaasen and Liam Livingstone, Pathan said Reddy could provide balance after a dip in form last season.

title: 'No direct talks, buying time': What Iran has said on Trump's claims
content: President Trump on Monday claimed "productive" talks with Iran, suggesting a potential deal. However, Iranian authorities denied any negotiations, accusing the US of using diplomacy as a cover for military action. Trump announced a five-day pause on strikes against Iranian energy infrastructure, citing ongoing discussions, while military actions continued on the ground.

title: 'Surya not being captain is a concern': Ashwin’s blunt verdict on MI captaincy
content: Ravichandran Ashwin believes Suryakumar Yadav should captain Mumbai Indians, citing his unbeaten T20I record and World Cup triumph. Despite Hardik Pandya's past success with Gujarat Titans, Ashwin feels Suryakumar's current leadership of India makes him the more logical choice for MI. The franchise faces a leadership dilemma as the IPL 2026 season approaches.

title: Who is AmineMaTue? French streamer Mohamed Amine Mahmoud joins Sidemen Charity Match
content: AmineMaTue, whose real name is Mohamed Amine Mahmoud, will play in the Sidemen Charity Match 2026 at Wembley Stadium. The French streamer is known for his Twitch content and football events. He joins Sidemen FC after being picked in the draft. His entry is expected to bring more viewers, though some fans have mixed reactions.

title: Fragile footing: How India, China face sizeable economic damage from US-Iran war
content: What does this latest disruption mean for the growth prospects of Asian economies that are in large part dependent on oil and energy imports. Since the start of the Middle East conflict, passage of ships through the Strait of Hormuz has been curtailed.

title: 'Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is not professional': RCB star’s stunning remark goes viral
content: Rajasthan Royals' young sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, set to turn 15, is poised for IPL 2026 after a record-breaking debut.  His meteoric rise includes international centuries and a match-winning U-19 World Cup performance. While lauded for his talent, questions linger about his professional approach off the field, sparking debate among cricket veterans.

title: Dhurandhar 2 faces Tamil Nadu plea for ban ahead of polls, amid BO success
content: Aditya Dhar’s Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge has landed in fresh controversy even as it continues its dream run at the box office. An urgent plea has reportedly been made before the Madras High Court seeking a ban on the film’s release in Tamil Nadu, citing concerns over the Model Code of Conduct ahead of the upcoming Assembly elections.

title: 'Petrol Shortage League': PSL trolled after league reduced to two venues
content: Under the new plan, the number of host cities has been cut from six to two, with all matches now set to be played in Lahore and Karachi.

title: Rupee breaches 94 against dollar for first time, closes flat after recovery
content: The Indian rupee hit an all-time low against the dollar, breaching 94 for the first time amid Middle East tensions, significant foreign fund outflows, and soaring crude oil prices.  This sharp decline, extending since the regional conflict began, has put pressure on Asia's third-largest economy, highly reliant on imported energy.  The Reserve Bank of India is reportedly offering mild support.

title: Inside Sanjay Dutt’s Rs 295cr lifestyle: Mumbai home, Dubai ventures, and luxury cars
content: Sanjay Dutt's Rs 40 crore Pali Hill residence, built on his parents' ancestral land, is a luxurious sanctuary blending family legacy with modern aesthetics. Beyond this Mumbai abode, his lifestyle is reportedly fueled by significant business ventures in Dubai, including a production house and diverse investments, contributing to his estimated Rs 295 crore net worth.

title: From 48-hr ultimatum to 5-day pause: Trump cites ‘productive’ US-Iran talks, halts infra strikes
content: US President Donald Trump announced a five-day pause on planned military strikes against Iran, citing "very good and productive" talks. This follows a 48-hour ultimatum to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Iran stated the strait remains open to non-enemy vessels, prioritizing diplomacy but demanding an end to aggression. The conflict has escalated with missile deployments and rising casualties.

title: US stocks today: Wall Street jumps as Trump delays Iran strikes; oil prices retreat
content: Global markets surged Monday as President Trump announced talks with Iran and a delay in planned strikes, easing fears of Middle East conflict. US stocks rallied significantly, oil prices tumbled, and European markets reversed earlier losses. However, Iran challenged the negotiation claims, casting a shadow of uncertainty over the de-escalation.

title: The 'buried' love stories: Lives lost in the name of ‘honour’
content: A wave of alleged honor killings across India sees families brutally murdering young couples who defy caste, interfaith, or societal norms. From UP's Moradabad to Gujarat's Rajkot, lovers are lured, attacked, and disposed of, highlighting a grim clash between personal choice and entrenched traditions. These premeditated acts underscore a disturbing national pattern.

title: Terror threat rocks Pakistan's PSL: Foreign players asked to 'withdraw immediately'
content: The development comes a day after the league was reduced to a closed-door event at two venues — Karachi and Lahore — amid the ongoing West Asia situation and related security issues.

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Ramadoss, Sasikala join hands, to field candidates in all 234 seats
content: S. Ramadoss did not clarify under which banner his candidates would be fielded as the judiciary has refused to restrain his estranged son Anbumani from using the name and flag of the PMK

title: A true benevolent authoritarian enforces discipline for the greater good: Seeman
content: Naam Tamilar Katchi chief coordinator Seeman contends that without discipline, there will be no order; he bats for an economy centred on agriculture in T.N. and plans to create government-led industries based on local resources if his party emerges victorious in the Assembly election

title: Bill to amend trans rights law listed for consideration, passing in Lok Sabha on March 24
content: Bill proposes amendments on transgender individuals, the procedure for obtaining a transgender certificate, and compliance requirements for medical institutions that may perform gender-affirming care procedures

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: NTK releases manifesto; pitches decentralised governance, anti-drug measures, Tamil-centric policies
content: The manifesto proposes a major administrative overhaul, including the creation of multiple functional capitals across Tamil Nadu to ease pressure on Chennai and improve access to governance

title: People will assess governance failure, corruption and favour UDF: KPCC chief
content: Sunny Joseph dismisses concerns of internal dissent within the Congress over granting electoral berth to former CPI(M) leaders; he says the UDF’s decision to support such leaders will strengthen the coalition; results of local body elections indicate strong anti-incumbency sentiment, he adds

title: Medical bodies raise concerns over permits for procedures
content: Warn of safety risks in Dental Council of India nod to Master of Dental Surgery doctors to perform such surgeries

title: Supreme Court gives Centre four-week leeway to respond to petition on airfare hike, says govt. handling ‘bigger problems now’
content: Petitioner had sought steps to address fare fluctuation, fare transparency, and continuity of essential air services

title: Centre launches AI skilling drive with Google, YouTube
content: Part of initiatives unveiled by Ashwini Vaishnaw to boost creative economy; a citizen creator platform, and in-built satellite tuners in television sets for access to DD Free Dish launched

title: Mannachanallur DMK MLA ‘distributes’ SUVs; ECI issues notice
content: The AIADMK alleged that Kathiravan and his father V. Srinivasan had given SUVs to five panchayat union secretaries and two town panchayat secretaries of the DMK on March 16 and 17 when the Model Code of Conduct was in force

title: Anil Ambani bank fraud case: Supreme Court says CBI, ED showed reluctance
content: Solicitor General Tushar Mehta promises to personally convey the court’s message to ED and CBI directors in “harsher terms”

title: Punjab official death case: Former AAP Minister’s arrest triggers credit war
content: Ruling AAP calls it swift action, while the Opposition parties say the Punjab govt. was forced to act

title: U.S. military pause on Iran attack: India tracking developments, says Centre
content: The announcement led to cooling of oil prices with benchmark Brent Crude futures (May) slipping more than 12%

title: Centre mulls delimitation based on 2011 Census to fast-track Women’s Reservation Act
content: “Under the amendments that the government wants to bring in, the basis for the selection of seats will be the Census data of 2011. The number of seats in Parliament will increase to 816, out of which 273 will be reserved for women,” a source said

title: Impact of West Asia war likely to be felt for long time, PM tells Lok Sabha
content: Country should be prepared and united, says Modi as he condemns attacks on commercial ships and obstruction of Strait of Hormuz; India has 5.3 million tonnes of petrol reserves, and govt. is working towards increasing this to 6.5 million tonnes

title: ED restitutes $5.6 billion assets in corruption cases: Director
content: India hosts 12th Steering Committee meeting of Global Operational Network of Anti-Corruption Law Enforcement Authorities, seeks deeper international cooperation

title: Ambulance drivers sensitised to Model Code of Conduct rules in Vellore, nearby districts
content: The guidelines say ambulance drivers should cooperate with Static Surveillance Teams during vehicle checks

title: About 20% of hotel industry’s LPG needs will be met daily with immediate e ect, says Karnataka Minister
content: As many as 10,000 cylinders will be given daily to hotels, industrial canteens, restaurants, and dhabas, among others, says Food and Civil Supplies Minister K.H. Muniyappa

title: Do not villainise subsidies as they strengthen our economy: Krishna Byre Gowda
content: Boosting consumer demand by providing money to poor people in the form of subsidies is a sure-shot approach for economic growth wherever there is an economic recession, he tells the Legislative Assembly

title: Bypoll: BJP candidates richer than Congress candidates
content: The BJP candidates are richer compared to the Congress candidates as per their affidavits filed along with their nomination papers in the byelections to Bagalkot and Davangere South Assembly constituencies.

title: Sunil Kumar demands White Paper on measures taken to address regional imbalance
content: Many taluks have remained backward despite the government spending about ₹20,000 crore as per the recommendations of the Nanjundappa Committee, he says

title: Karnataka bypolls: CM, DyCM, Union Ministers accompany party nominees; 58 in all file nominations
content: In all, 19 candidates filed nomination papers for the Bagalkot seat, while 39 candidates filed their nominations for the Davangere South seat before the deadline ended on Monday (March 23).

title: ECI urged to issue postal ballots to candidates contesting elections
content: Former Tamil Nadu Information Commissioner says many candidates unable to cast vote as their constituency was far away

title: Pradyot denies talks with BJP, rules out alliance in TTAADC elections
content: Pradyot issued the statement amid reports that his party is in talks with BJP leaders over fighting the TTAADC elections

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: LDF throws its weight behind IUML rebel in Mankada face-off with Ali
content: CPI(M) initially announced M.P. Alavi as its candidate, but he withdrew his nomination extending support to IUML rebel Kunnath Mohammed

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: BJP seal on Election Commission of India letter sparks row in State
content: CPI(M) asks whether seals are being casually swapped and all pretences are being dropped. Office of CEO, Kerala, says the 2019 letter, on which the BJP had affixed a seal when its functionaries approached the CEO’s office for clarification, was distributed recently by oversight

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: MDMK releases manifesto; calls for total prohibition, life imprisonment for sexual offenders
content: In its manifesto released on Tuesday (March 17, 2026) by party general secretary Vaiko, the MDMK said Tamil Nadu should be free from liquor and other drugs which are ‘responsible for the degeneration of youth’

title: 634 drunk driving cases booked in week-long BTP drive in Bengaluru
content: The police added that similar drives will continue in the coming days to ensure stricter compliance with traffic regulations

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Vijay, TVK seniors eye Chennai constituencies
content: Vijay is highly likely to make his electoral debut from the Perambur constituency, sources in the party say

title: Election officials seize ₹6 lakh unaccounted cash in Vellore, nearby districts
content: In a similar incident, election officials seized ₹2.5 lakh from textile traders near Ambur town in Tirupattur when they stopped their vehicle on Chennai - Bengaluru Highway (NH 48)

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: CPI(M), Congress accuse each other of fragmenting ‘LDF-UDF duopoly’ in Kerala by aiding BJP
content: Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan accuses Congress national leadership under Rahul Gandhi of playing as BJP’s ‘B-Team’. AICC general secretary K.C. Venugopal says PM Modi and Amit Shah have found ‘a willing tool’ in Pinarayi Vijayan to attack Rahul Gandhi, who is ‘fighting a lone battle against Sangh Parivar and its corporate backers’

title: Nitish Kumar kicks off fifth phase of Samriddhi Yatra
content: The Chief Minister announced that his government has set a target of providing jobs and employment opportunities to 1 crore youths in the next five years

title: Gehlot accuses Rajasthan government of dismantling health model with neglect
content: The veteran Congress leader pointed out that an acute shortage of blood at Jaipur’s major hospitals has created a health emergency

title: T.N. Assembly election: CPI(M) accepts five-seat offer, signs pact with DMK
content: Though not satisfied, we accepted the seats because we do not want to create a favourable condition for the AIADMK-BJP combine, says CPI(M) State general secretary Shanmugam

title: No work during day’s peak hours from April 1, Odisha govt issues notification
content: “Stating that in view of the rising temperatures expected in April this year, the possibility of heatstroke during the summer season cannot be ruled out”

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: 141 candidates file nomination papers in Kozhikode, scrutiny to be held on March 24
content: Major political fronts to bring their prominent leaders for campaigning, Leader of the Opposition in the Lok Sabha Rahul Gandhi to attend event on March 25

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: 1,252 candidates file nominations
content: The final picture will emerge after scrutiny of nomination papers on March 24 and the March 26 deadline for the withdrawal of candidature

title: 1.68 lakh cases of defacement removed in Tamil Nadu, says Election Commission
content: It says the statues of late leaders need not be covered, but the photographs of politically active leaders must be covered. It also issues a clarification in respect of cases wherein individuals are  found carrying cash

title: Potato farming in Uttar Pradesh has entered a structural crisis, says Samajwadi Party
content: The party said without correcting storage economics and price risk‑sharing, potato farming in western U.P. will remain structurally unviable

title: Rajinikanth refutes TVK leader Aadhav Arjuna’s claim on the actor refraining from politics
content: In December 2020, Mr. Rajinikanth announced his political entry. However, later that month, in a three-page statement, he cited the COVID-19 pandemic and his health condition to make an exit without entering politics.

title: Nadimarg massacre anniversary: Kashmiri Pandits ask Muslims to come forward to ensure their safe return
content: Scores of Pandits and Muslims swarmed the venue at Pulwama’s Nadimarg and paid floral tributes at the plaque carrying the names of the victims

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: AIADMK allots 27 seats to BJP, 18 to PMK
content: Headed by T.T.V. Dhinakaran, the Amma Makkal Munnetra Kazhagam (AMMK), a breakaway group of the AIADMK, has got 11 seats

title: Greater cooperation needed between India, Russia under evolving multipolar order: Jaishankar
content: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov says India-Russia ties have “major significance” in the backdrop of U.S.-Israel war on Iran

title: Two more Indian vessels cross Strait of Hormuz
content: Two foreign-owned and foreign-flagged LPG carriers, Hellas Gladiator and Gas Jupiter, each carrying 24,000 tonnes are expected to reach Vishakhapatnam on March 30, 2026.

title: Colombia Military Aircraft Carrying 125 On Board Crashes, Many Feared Dead
content: A military transport plane with 125 people on board crashed shortly after taking off Monday in southwestern Colombia, causing an undetermined number of casualties, officials said.

title: US Comedian Bill Cosby Ordered To Pay $19 Million Over Sex Abuse Claim
content: The jury took three days to deliver its verdict, ordering Bill Cosby to pay $19.3 million, a figure that could increase if they add punitive damages.

title: Top US Defence Official Elbridge Colby To Visit India
content: US Ambassador to India Sergio Gor has announced the upcoming visit of top defence official Elbridge Colby to the country.

title: A 'Fake News To Manipulate Markets' Counter After Israeli Media's Big Claim
content: Supporters of Iran's parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf alleged Israeli disinformation to make him a target of his own people

title: 'Whose Side Are We On? We Stand With India': PM Modi On Middle East Crisis

title: Patriots release Dobbs, making DeVito new QB2
content: the decision comes after the club signed no. 3 quarterback Tommy DeVito to a two-year deal with a base value of $4.4 million . the team now projects to bump Dobbs, on a cheaper contract, to the no. 2 role .

title: Former No. 1 pick Fultz signing 10-day with Raps
content: Toronto Raptors vs. Phoenix Suns: Game Highlights (1:14) Former No. 1 pick  Markelle Fultz  is signing a 10-day contract with the  Toronto Raptors , the team announced Monday. Fultz, 27, last played in the NBA last season, appearing in 21 games for the  Sacramento Kings . He spent time this season with the Raptors 905 G League team. Injuries have plagued Fultz since the 76ers drafted him in 2017; he appeared in fewer than 20 games in each of his first two seasons. Fultz has since evolved into a strong defensive guard capable of moving the ball on offense. His best season came in 2022-23, when he averaged 14 points and 5.7 assists while shooting 51.4% from the field for the  Orlando Magic . The Raptors are in a tight race with the Hawks, 76ers, Magic, Heat and Hornets to stay out of the Eastern Conference play-in.

title: What returning production looks like for the 2026 college football season
content: the more continuity and experience you return from last season, the more likely you are to improve . it's still better to return a lot of your production than a little, even if last year's headliner bombed . a combination of injuries, tactical stagnation and disappointing development held back the Tigers .
